h1: 14-Place Dishwasher with TrueSteam‚ĄĘ, QuadWash‚ĄĘ, EasyRack‚ĄĘ Plus, Inverter Direct Drive & SmartThinQ‚ĄĘ

modules.head: Reasons to Buy LG Dishwasher
modules.body: LG QuadWash‚ĄĘ TrueSteam‚ĄĘ dishwasher combines powerful cleaning, steam hygiene and smart connectivity in an elegant, whisper-quiet design.

imgs.a: LG dishwasher hero image showing key benefits

modules.head: Sparkling Dishes, Less Water Spots
modules.body: TrueSteam‚ĄĘ made by boiling water reaches the entire surface of every dish inside the tub, resulting in sparkling clean dishes. Pure water particles of steam also help reduce water spots by up to 30%.
modules.disc: *Reduction of water spots vs previous LG dishwasher without TrueSteam. Tested under LG internal conditions; results may vary.

modules.head: Clean from Every Angle
modules.body: Thanks to Multi-Motion spray arms and high-pressure jets, QuadWash‚ĄĘ delivers maximum coverage to get dishes clean the first time ‚ÄĒ four multi-directional arms shooting water in various angles reach every corner.

modules.head: Easy Loading & Maximum Flexibility
modules.body: Adjust on-the-fly with foldable tines, height-adjustable upper rack (3 levels), and a dedicated 3rd rack for long flatware and small espresso cups ‚ÄĒ load any shape of dish or pan with ease.

imgs.a: EasyRack Plus with foldable tines and 3rd rack

modules.head: Quiet, Efficient & Reliable
modules.body: LG's Inverter Direct Drive Motor is designed with quiet in mind. With fewer moving parts, you get reliable 43 dBA (Class B) performance ‚ÄĒ one of the quietest dishwashers in its class ‚ÄĒ and LG's trademark long-lasting durability.
modules.disc: *Backed by LG's 10-year Inverter Direct Drive Motor warranty (terms apply).

imgs.a: Inverter Direct Drive Motor for quiet, reliable washing

modules.head: Greater Convenience & Performance
modules.body: Auto Open Dry automatically opens the door at the end of the cycle, letting humid air escape and fresh air reach dishes for superior drying. Turbo Cycle cleans hard-soiled dishes in under an hour.

imgs.a: Auto Open Dry and Turbo Cycle convenience features

modules.head: Gentle on delicates, powerful on pots
modules.body: Gently clean your delicate dishes while power-washing heavy-duty pots and pans simultaneously with Dual Zone Wash. High Temp reaches tub temperatures up to 80¬įC during the rinse cycle for hygienic care.

imgs.a: Dual Zone Wash ‚ÄĒ upper rack gentle + lower rack power

modules.head: Innovation for a Smarter, Connected Home
modules.body: Download new wash cycles (Pots & Pans, Casseroles, Glassware, Night Care), personalise settings and get remote monitoring through the LG ThinQ¬ģ smartphone app.
modules.disc: *Wi-Fi connection and LG ThinQ app required. Remote start unavailable on this model; remote monitoring only.

modules.head: Machine Clean Reminder + Rapid Troubleshooting
modules.body: A lighted indicator reminds you every 30 cycles to run the Machine Clean cycle. Smart Diagnosis‚ĄĘ helps resolve issues quickly through your smartphone with guided solutions and next steps.

modules.head: Minimalist Exterior, Elegant Interior, Micro LED Display
modules.body: Elegant minimalist exterior complements any kitchen. Durable, easy-to-maintain stainless steel interior. Sleek hidden controls with clear Micro LED digital readout make cycle selection intuitive.

imgs.a: Minimalist LG dishwasher design with Micro LED display
